home.title: Aldonza Gourmet | Wines, Cava, Olive Oil and Saffron
home.description: Wine, cava, olive oil and saffron, Spanish gourmet products made in the Dehesa de Navamarín. Own winery and mill with wine and oil tourism and visits. Live the Aldonza experience!

home.hero_alt: Come visit our winery and mill. Make your reservation here!
home.intro: Appreciating the subtlety of every movement that nature gives us is the origin of the sensations that our wines, cavas, extra virgin olive oil and saffron will awaken in you.
home.intro_finca: The environment is what makes the difference in our products. Welcome to the Dehesa de Navamarín.
home.escucha_intro: Transport yourself through music to new places that will awaken new sensations. Simply listen and let yourself go!
